name: Creamed Chicken Over Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as directed on package. Drain and place in serving bowl. Add margarine and parsley. Toss until the margarine melts.
2. Meanwhile, reheat chicken in a saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, until hot. Spoon over the noodles.
(Note: This recipe is attributed to MOMnAaron from frozen-assets@xc.org on May 23, 1998.)
